background_events.description: Background Events are notable things that have happened in the character's life before adventuring. Optional. Roll or choose. If starting older than standard, gain multiple rolls (see Age Table). Re-roll duplicates or contradictions.

table.event: A case of mistaken identity resulted in imprisonment or punishment. You want to find whoever was responsible for the crime you were punished for.
A curse has been placed upon your family. All children of the opposite gender have died in tragic circumstances. You are chosen to find a way to lift the curse.
A girl in your community wants you to carry messages to a boy in another community. She pays well and you believe they are love letters. But can you be sure?
A group of travelling players visited your community. As a child you were enthralled, then kidnapped, carried far away and abandoned.
A priceless object owned by your family was stolen by enemies. On his deathbed the head of the family made you swear to retrieve it.
A relative has bequeathed you a secret: the whereabouts of a lost legendary heirloom, an imprisoned deity, or special spell rituals.
A sibling has been betrothed to someone from your childhood you consider an enemy. You fear your sibling is being turned against you.
You believe yourself to be suffering a divine or magical curse. Moan and whinge at every opportunity, or remain completely stoic.
An old warlike relative died, bequeathing you a useless suit of armour which will fall apart when first used. Despite its shoddiness you are fond of it.
A scholar, priest or mystic visits your community and demonstrates supernatural wisdom. You receive dreams of meeting this person again.
Distant relatives demanded you be sent to stay with them. Your father could not refuse. They were cold and distant despite insisting you stay for years.
Fate has closely watched over you. Siblings drowned, friends died from plague, parents disgraced, but you emerged unscathed. Are you truly blessed?
You have shamed your family and been cast out. Were you to blame or a scapegoat? You lived on your wits but people grew suspicious.
One of your parents is a member of a noble family who turned their back on their heritage. You are an heir to a noble estate or title.
On your birthday two years ago it rained frogs. Last birthday it rained lizards. What will it rain this year?
Playing one day you discovered a dead warrior in the cellar or outbuildings. Who was he? Who killed him?
You have picked up a loyal companion or retainer — a childhood friend or hanger-on from a chance encounter.
You possess a mundane item that a friend or family member claims is magical. So far no magical properties have manifested.
You have been marked as special by the gods. You carry a symbol of great reverence to a particular religion or cult, possibly an enemy of your culture.
You have a favoured beloved pet which follows you everywhere. No special abilities, but offers comfort and companionship.
You studied with a noted master, scholar or wise man. When you meet up, you can request personal tuition for related Professional Skills.
You suffered a horrific attack leaving you psychologically scarred. Gain a new passion of Fear (thing which harmed you).
You have sworn a fervent oath with a member of the opposite sex. You sense any danger they are subject to even when miles apart.
You were born into a once rich and powerful family that has fallen on rough times or suffered a severe blow to its reputation.
You were born with an unusual sensitivity to a particular substance, species or supernatural power. Successful Perception roll detects rough location.
You were born with or received a mark resembling a glyph. All who see it remark — some with wonder, others fear. A quest is needed to awaken it.
You are magically gifted, attracting a sorcerer, priest or shaman. You may enter a magical profession, or become their target for power extraction.
You awoke to find a valuable object with religious or ruling importance in bed with you. Keep it or return it under suspicion of theft?
As a child you nearly died from a fatal disease, but since then have never been ill. Are you paranoid about infection or believe yourself immune?
You were attacked by an unidentifiable wild beast which nearly killed you. It vanished but you feel an ominous presence at the edges of your homelands.
You spent childhood as a slave before escaping or being freed. How do you view slavery now?
The eldest family member harbours a great secret to be entrusted to you when old enough. Can you contain your curiosity?
As a child you witnessed a ceremony or ritual that haunts your dreams. You feel compelled to discover what you witnessed.
Your family was hunted by powerful foes. Why? Are they still following you? Should you confront them?
You are bastard-born. Your mother swears your father was a man of note, but she is of low status. You would love to find him.
You are adopted. Your true parents abandoned you or were killed. Jealous relatives see you as an imposter who should be cast out.
A tinker read your palm and declared you would become a great hero but first encounter 'a great sorrow, a great victory, and a great reversal.'
Your family is artistically adept with far-reaching fame. You gain access to high status patrons if you are an artist, or face irritation at your lack of talent.
A sibling committed a heinous crime bringing shame on your family. They fled, casting suspicion on you.
You are a twin. Your sibling has similar characteristics and skills. You always seem to know where they are.
You are the sole survivor of a horrific catastrophe. Your entire family was wiped out.
You met a great hero or villain when they were unknown. You became friends before parting. Will they remember you?
Your elder sibling is a great hero and you live in their shadow. You are desperate to prove yourself their equal.
Your family crossed a wealthy or influential family and suffered. That family is now your Enemy.
Your family follows a religion or philosophy unaccepted by the community, marking you as different.
Your family has a reputation for luck. Everything turns out splendidly. But you've heard something suspicious about how it was obtained.
Your family performed a great service for a wealthy noble. You were taken into service. You gain this powerful patron as an Ally.
Your family was ever cruel to you while your siblings received favour. At the first opportunity you left them behind.
Your hereditary line is slowly becoming extinct. Every year one member dies in a frightful 'accident.' Are you next?
Your family was involved in a community event making them famous or infamous. The legacy follows you everywhere.
Your family was wealthy once, now reduced to poverty. How did it lose its fortune? Was it due to circumstance or others?
Your family, previously poor, somehow attained great wealth. How? What effect? Will someone reclaim the fortune?
Your family sent you into service with a prestigious family. As their ward you learned a dire secret that if revealed would get you killed.
You accidentally killed a close friend or sibling when playing. You fled silently. The body was never found. You've lived with guilt since.
You experienced a supernatural epiphany. A god spoke to you or spirits manifested and danced about you. Blessing or blasphemy?
